attributes.description: Alerts when burstable unlimited-mode instances are charged for surplus CPU credits, indicating credit balance exhaustion and overage billing.
attributes.name: [AWS EC2 OTel] CPU surplus credits charged

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-aws.ec2.otel-*
| WHERE Namespace == "AWS/EC2"
    AND MetricName == "CPUSurplusCreditsCharged"
    AND stat == "Sum"
| EVAL ec2_instance = CONCAT(InstanceId, " (", cloud.region, ")")
| STATS total_surplus_charged = SUM(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUSurplusCreditsCharged`) BY ec2_instance
// Any surplus charge indicates credit exhaustion — tune threshold if noise from tiny overages
| WHERE total_surplus_charged > 0.0
| SORT total_surplus_charged DESC
| LIMIT 100
